LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul.description: 一个因长期暴露在有毒辐射下而扭曲的人类。它们腐烂的肉体证明了它们的转变，但它们仍然存在——对毒素免疫并被毒素治愈。有人说他们已经死了，只是太固执，无法停止行走。
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul.descriptionShort: 肉体腐烂的辐射变异人类可以被毒素治愈。
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul.label: 食尸鬼
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_Feral.description: 心智已经变得面目全非的食尸鬼。在原始本能的驱使下，当他们的野性压倒他们时，他们很容易突然爆发暴力。他们腐烂的肉体可以通过毒素治愈，但他们的人性几乎消失了。
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_Feral.descriptionShor: 精神恶化的食尸鬼容易发生暴力事件。
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_Feral.label: 食尸鬼
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_Glowing_One.descripti: A rare and 危险 ghoul variant that emits constant radiation. Their bodies glow with an eerie green light as they damage nearby non-ghouls while healing other ghouls with their radioactive aura.
发出致命辐射的罕见放射性食尸鬼。
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_Glowing_One.label: 发光的一个
LanguageData.FCP_Xenotype_Ghoul_GlowingOne_Feral.desc: A feral glowing ghoul whose mind has deteriorated while their radioactive body continues to emit deadly radiation. Driven by primal instincts and prone to violent outbursts, they are among the most 危险 ghouls in the wasteland.
精神日益恶化的野生放射性食尸鬼。
